docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOW, DARIAN AS TO DEFENDANT STAGNITTO, GREG

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOW, DARIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STAGNITTO, GREG $2,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,690.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-06-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-06-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE HURLEY. PLAINTIFF DARIAN LOW IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GREG STAGNITTO IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
